sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45846" key="e)fubristh/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφυβρ-ιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n45846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">insulting</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴαμβοι</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.352</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
